compiled_state.title: [dso shim]: record-test-status.sh not in shim -> dso command not found error
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
During sprint execution, re-recording test status after a diff hash change failed. The dso shim does not expose record-test-status.sh even though it lives at plugins/dso/hooks/.

## Expected Behavior
.claude/scripts/dso record-test-status.sh works like capture-review-diff.sh and verify-review-diff.sh.

## Actual Behavior
dso: command not found: record-test-status.sh — must use direct path bash plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh instead.
